items.body:
No API design issues found. This is a clean first TypeSpec migration from `@azure/arm-recoveryservicesbackup@13.2.0` to `14.0.0-beta.1`. All version strings are consistent across `package.json`, the context file (`src/api/recoveryServicesBackupContext.ts`), and `CHANGELOG.md`. The `tsp-location.yaml` correctly references `Azure/azure-rest-api-specs` with a valid 40-character commit SHA. No `_N` suffix naming collisions, `AutoGenerated` suffixes, `unknown` types, `ae-forgotten-export` warnings, or alpha versions were found. CI is passing.
